历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 20681 → 21589 → 23501 → 26330, shifting backward for four consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 5649 places and an average annual shift of about 1883 places, showing a clear downward trend; the 2025 baseline is about 26330. The enrollment plan for Physics Category was 10 students from 2022 to 2025, and remains 10 students in 2026, with the enrollment scale unchanged for five consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 79th in the 2026 Soft Science main list, with recent rankings stable in the 75–80 range, placing it in the mid-tier of the national top 100; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 70th, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; Psychology is A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory is A, Education is A-, Sports Science is A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines; the Physics Category enrollment majors (Chemistry, Physics, Optoelectronics, Network Engineering) have average relevance to the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended popular majors, partially aligning with the university's Physics Category majors in Optoelectronic Information and Network Engineering; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 2025 (about 358,000), with an estimated 380,000 Physics Category examinees, leading to intensified competition, showing a slight upward trend in recent years; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and recruits across provinces in Jiangsu, with no local regional preference advantage; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu is only 10 students, a small scale, making rankings susceptible to fluctuations in the total number of examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 46% in the total number of examinees in Jiangsu Province leading to intensified competition, and the stable reputation of the university with no abnormal signals, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 26330; the predicted minimum ranking is about 26380, with a range of 25880–26880.
